nasb.text: Now in the seventh year, in the fifth month, on the tenth of the month, certain of the elders of Israel came to inquire of the Lord, and sat before me.

esv.text: In the seventh year, in the fifth month, on the tenth day of the month, certain of the elders of Israel came to inquire of the Lord, and sat before me.

cnv.text: 第七年五月十日，有幾個以色列的長老來求問耶和華，他們坐在我的面前。

ccb.text: 第七年五月十日，有几个以色列的长老来到我这里，坐在我面前。
